Class RuntimeErrorCatcher

java.lang.Object
org.skriptlang.skript.log.runtime.RuntimeErrorCatcher
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, RuntimeErrorConsumer
public class RuntimeErrorCatcher extends Object implements RuntimeErrorConsumer, AutoCloseable
A RuntimeErrorConsumer to be used in RuntimeErrorManager to catch RuntimeErrors. This should always be used with start() and stop().

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    void
    printError(RuntimeError error)
    Prints a single error with all its information.
    void
    printFrameOutput(Frame.FrameOutput output, Level level)
    Prints the output of a frame, including skipped errors, timeouts, and whatever other information required.
    RuntimeErrorCatcher
    start()
    Starts this RuntimeErrorCatcher, removing all RuntimeErrorConsumers from RuntimeErrorManager and storing them in storedConsumers.
    void
    stop()
    Stops this RuntimeErrorCatcher, removing from RuntimeErrorManager and restoring the previous RuntimeErrorConsumers from storedConsumers.

  • Constructor Details

    • RuntimeErrorCatcher

      public RuntimeErrorCatcher()

  • Method Details

    • getFilter

      @Nullable public @Nullable RuntimeErrorFilter getFilter()
      Specified by:
      getFilter in interface RuntimeErrorConsumer
      Returns:
      The filter to use when checking if this consumer should print an error. Defaults to the standard config-driven filter. If no filter should be used, return RuntimeErrorFilter.NO_FILTER. This value MUST be effectively final.

    • start

      public RuntimeErrorCatcher start()
      Starts this RuntimeErrorCatcher, removing all RuntimeErrorConsumers from RuntimeErrorManager and storing them in storedConsumers. Makes this RuntimeErrorCatcher the only RuntimeErrorConsumer in RuntimeErrorManager to catch RuntimeErrors.
      Returns:
      This RuntimeErrorCatcher

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Stops this RuntimeErrorCatcher, removing from RuntimeErrorManager and restoring the previous RuntimeErrorConsumers from storedConsumers. Does not clear cached errors. May be restarted.

    • getCachedErrors

      public @UnmodifiableView List<RuntimeError> getCachedErrors()
      Gets all the cached RuntimeErrors.

    • clearCachedErrors

      public RuntimeErrorCatcher clearCachedErrors()
      Clear all cached RuntimeErrors.

    • printError

      public void printError(RuntimeError error)
      Description copied from interface: RuntimeErrorConsumer
      Prints a single error with all its information.
      Specified by:
      printError in interface RuntimeErrorConsumer
      Parameters:
      error - The error to print.

    • printFrameOutput

      public void printFrameOutput(Frame.FrameOutput output, Level level)
      Description copied from interface: RuntimeErrorConsumer
      Prints the output of a frame, including skipped errors, timeouts, and whatever other information required.
      Specified by:
      printFrameOutput in interface RuntimeErrorConsumer
      Parameters:
      output - An output object containing unmodifiable views of the frame data.
      level - The severity of this frame (error vs warning).

    • close

      public void close()
      Stops the catcher and clears the cached errors.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
